meta.team: Designer · PM · AI Engineers · Data Analyst

title:
Cutting Survey Creation
Time by 90%
Through AI-Assisted Design
description: A 40% survey abandonment rate and 2–4 hour creation workflows were quietly killing retention. I led end-to-end design of an AI-assisted builder that reshaped how users create, brand, and launch surveys — in under 10 minutes.
ndaNote: Employer and product details anonymised at their request. Full context available under mutual NDA.
